title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, a CS professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed with emphasis on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools creates durable skills across hype cycles. He cautions against the "AI-Native" trap, claiming AI cannot change people but people can change AI.
